description: A privacy-safe, content-driven portfolio framework awaiting approved case studies.

hero.note: A quiet framework for future case studies. No identity, contact data, or project assets are published in this version.

statement: A portfolio is not a gallery. It is an argument made visible.

method.name: FRAME
method.description: Separate the real question from its visible symptoms.

method.name: SEQUENCE
method.description: Turn information into hierarchy, rhythm, and a readable journey.

method.name: PROTOTYPE
method.description: Test comprehension and behavior before polishing surfaces.

method.name: REFINE
method.description: Remove every decision that cannot be explained or deliberately felt.
